# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

node {
    stage('Input') {
        // Get the user inputs for Jenkins job configuration 
        def params = checkout scm ?: [$class: 'GitSCM', branches: [[name: 'master']],  doGenerateSubmoduleConfigurations: false, extensions: [], submoduleCfg: [], userRemoteConfigs: [[url: 'https://github.com/username/repo.git']]]
        BUILD_COMMAND = params.BUILD_COMMAND ?: "echo 'No build command provided'"
        TEST_SCRIPT = params.TEST_SCRIPT ?: "echo 'No test script provided'"
        DEPLOYMENT_STEPS = params.DEPLOYMENT_STEPS ?: "echo 'No deployment steps provided'"
    }
    
    stage('Build') {
        // Execute the build command
        sh BUILD_COMMAND
    }
    
    stage('Testing') {
        // Execute the test script
        sh TEST_SCRIPT
    }
    
    stage('Deployment') {
        // Execute the deployment steps
        sh DEPLOYMENT_STEPS
    }
}
